result.stdout:
Description:
  Configure NuGet based NodeJs setup

Usage:
  dotnet-nodejs-linux [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init          Unpacks the NodeJs binaries and adds the location to the PATH environment variable
  get-location  Prints the location of the NodeJs binaries that should be added to the PATH environment variable
  reset         Deletes the NodeJs binaries and removes the location from the PATH environment variable

commands.payload:
Description:
  Configure NuGet based NodeJs setup

Usage:
  dotnet-nodejs-linux [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init          Unpacks the NodeJs binaries and adds the location to the PATH environment variable
  get-location  Prints the location of the NodeJs binaries that should be added to the PATH environment variable
  reset         Deletes the NodeJs binaries and removes the location from the PATH environment variable

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unpacks the NodeJs binaries and adds the location to the PATH environment variable

Usage:
  dotnet-nodejs-linux init [options]

Options:
  -t, --target <Machine|User>  The environment variable target to adjust [default: User]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deletes the NodeJs binaries and removes the location from the PATH environment variable

Usage:
  dotnet-nodejs-linux reset [options]

Options:
  -t, --target <Machine|User>  The environment variable target to adjust [default: User]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
